title: State Asserts Jurisdiction on Tribal Lands Without Consent
description: A state attorney general attempts to prosecute a tribal member in state court for conduct occurring on tribal land, without tribal consent and without express congressional authorization. The scenario tests whether Article X's new tribal-sovereignty framework gives courts a direct basis to block state jurisdictional overreach and recognize the tribal court as the proper first-instance forum.

details.conduct: a state criminal prosecution against a tribal member for conduct occurring wholly on tribal trust land
